title: aspidium pennsylvanicum
intro: Aspidium pennsylvanicum, also known as the Pennsylvania fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Aspleniaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aspidium pennsylvanicum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Aspidium pennsylvanicum can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
